32.reason: [The program always skips the next character after '-', even when no expansion occurs. This causes missing output of the character after '-' in non-expandable cases like 'B-e'.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  This line always increments i, skipping the next character even when no expansion occurs. As a result, if the types do not match, the '-' and the following character are omitted from output.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  缺少else分支处理不满足类型或大小条件的情况，导致直接跳过字符
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Unconditionally increments i to skip the next character even when expansion fails, causing missing output for invalid ranges like 'B-e'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Skips '-' without printing it or the next character when expansion conditions fail, causing missing output for cases like B-e
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The program always skips the next character after '-', even when no expansion occurs. This causes missing output of the character after '-' in non-expandable cases like 'B-e'.]
